description: You are a certified fitness instructor preparing a virtual group coaching session. Using Jitsi Meet at http://localhost:8080, set up a professional live coaching environment in a room named 'FitCoach-LiveSession'. The environment must feature a virtual background (blur or image), your display name as 'Coach Rivera', a policy requiring all participants to start muted, and the highest available video quality. Write a session configuration guide to /home/ga/Desktop/coaching_session_config.txt detailing the meeting URL, the specific settings configured (background type, quality, and mute policy), and replication guidelines for the studio admin team.
